subject: Q2 Product Launch Venue Booking Request
body: We need to book a venue for Q2 product launch, estimated cost $500K. Please approve.

subject: Online Ad Campaign Request
body: Requesting Q2 digital advertising budget $300K for social media promotion.

subject: Industry Summit Sponsorship Request
body: Requesting sponsorship for 2026 Industry Summit, $5M. This is our most important brand exposure opportunity.

subject: KOL Collaboration Request
body: Requesting $1.5M for collaboration with top KOLs, expected to bring significant brand exposure.

subject: Media PR Campaign Request
body: Requesting Q2 media PR budget $2M for brand crisis management and positive publicity.

subject: Brand Upgrade Design Fee Request
body: Requesting $800K for brand visual upgrade design, including VI system and brand manual.

subject: Annual Event Execution Request
body: We are a previous event vendor, hoping to continue cooperation this year, requesting $3M budget.
